zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 你昨天不是去校友聚餐了吗，有没有加上那个你念叨好久的美术系女生的微信啊？

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 那必须啊，我上去聊了两句她就主动把微信给我了。

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 可以啊你，这撩人的本事也太强了，快教教我呗。

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 害，这也没啥，就找她感兴趣的话题聊就行了，别一上来就瞎夸。

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 我上次尝试跟女生搭话，刚说两句人家就走了，根本没这天赋。

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 没事多练练就好了，胆子大点自然点，魅力自然就出来了。

en.speaker: A
en.text: Didn't you go to the alumni dinner yesterday? Did you get the WeChat ID of that art department girl you've been talking about for ages?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Of course I did. I went up to chat with her for a couple of minutes and she offered it to me on her own.
en.highlight: offered it to me on her own

en.speaker: A
en.text: Wow, that's so cool! Your **rizz** is literally insane, can you teach me some tricks?

en.speaker: B
en.text: Ah it's no big deal. Just talk about topics she's interested in, don't throw random compliments out of nowhere.

en.speaker: A
en.text: Last time I tried to strike up a conversation with a girl, she left after two sentences. I don't have that natural talent at all.

en.speaker: B
en.text: You'll get better with practice. Just be more confident and natural, your **rizz** will shine through eventually.

definitions.en: (slang, noun) Natural charm and charisma that enables a person to easily attract romantic or social interest from others
definitions.zh: （俚语，名词）天生的社交魅力、撩人能力，指能轻松吸引他人好感尤其是获得恋爱关注的特质

definitions.en: (slang, verb) To charm, flirt with or seduce someone, usually used in the phrasal verb "rizz up"
definitions.zh: （俚语，动词）撩、调情、吸引某人，常用于短语rizz up

examples.en: That guy has crazy rizz, he gets phone numbers from almost every girl he talks to at parties.
examples.zh: 那个男生的撩人能力超强，派对上他几乎和每个女生聊天都能要到对方的手机号

examples.en: Don't try to rizz up my best friend, she's already in a committed relationship.
examples.zh: 你别想撩我最好的朋友，她已经有稳定交往的对象了

examples.en: I've been watching dating tutorials to improve my rizz before I ask my crush out.
examples.zh: 我最近一直在看约会教程提升我的撩人技巧，之后好约我喜欢的人出去

collocations.zh: 顶级魅力，超强撩人能力
